code_items.intent:
Refactored vector utility functions for improved code clarity and consistency: renamed parameter `v` to `vec` across all functions, updated JSDoc comments for better documentation, simplified `redim` implementation using logical OR for padding, and replaced manual loops with `Array.map()` for unary operations (`abs`, `floor`, `ceil`, `round`, `fract`).

Refactored vector utility functions to use more descriptive parameter names (e.g., `v` to `vec`), improved JSDoc comments for clarity, simplified `abs`, `floor`, `ceil`, `round`, and `fract` implementations using `Array.map`, and removed redundant length checks in `equals` and `approxEquals` while fixing the `norm` function to no longer throw on zero-length vectors.

Refactored vector utility functions to use consistent parameter naming (`vec` instead of `v`), improved JSDoc comments for clarity, simplified `abs`, `floor`, `ceil`, `round`, and `fract` implementations using `Array.map`, and removed redundant length checks in `equals`/`approxEquals` and the zero-length check in `norm`.

Refactored vector utility functions for improved readability and consistency: renamed parameter `v` to `vec` across all functions, updated JSDoc comments for clarity, simplified `abs`, `floor`, `ceil`, `round`, and `fract` implementations using `Array.map`, removed redundant length checks in `equals`/`approxEquals`, and fixed `cross` to always allocate a 3-element output array.
Renamed the parameter `v` to `vec` in the `smoothStep` and `toString` functions for improved clarity and consistency, without altering any functional behavior.
Updated JSDoc comments for clarity and consistency, and simplified the `redim` function implementation by replacing the explicit length check with a logical OR fallback for padding.
